278.reason: The closing double quote '"' is not appended to the token before adding it to the list, causing the output to miss the closing quote.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  The closing double quote '"' is not appended to the token before adding it to the list, causing the output to miss the closing quote.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  The closing double quote is not added to the token, causing the output to miss the trailing quote.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [missing closing quote in token: loop exits when c == '\"', but the closing quote is not appended to token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The closing quote '"' is not appended to the token string, so the output string literal is missing the ending quote]

275.reason: The loop condition checks if the current character is the closing quote, but it does not include the closing quote in the token. The loop exits when c is '"', so the closing quote is missing from the token string.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The loop condition checks if the current character is the closing quote, but it does not include the closing quote in the token. The loop exits when c is '"', so the closing quote is missing from the token string.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The loop terminates when c is the closing quote '"', but this character is not added to the token string. The closing quote must be appended to the token before creating the Token object.

286.reason: Similarly, the loop exits when c is "'", so the closing single quote is missing from the token string.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Similarly, the loop terminates when c is the closing quote ''', but this character is not added to the token string. The closing quote must be appended to the token.
